Sitemap: https://ralphworkflow.com/sitemap.xml

data.name: Ralph Workflow
data.description: Free open-source AI agent orchestration CLI for Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode. Runs unattended project-scale work and hands back a reviewable result: diff, checks, and notes. For developers with work too big to babysit and too risky to trust blindly.

directory_submissions.status: error: Remote end closed connection without response

data.name: Ralph Workflow
data.description: Free open-source AI agent orchestration CLI. Turns Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode into unattended project pipelines that end in reviewable output: diff, checks, and a short receipt. For developers who want to leave substantial work running and come back to something they can actually judge.

data.name: Ralph Workflow
data.description: Open-source orchestration CLI for AI coding agents. Spec-driven, agent-agnostic, and built to leave reviewable output instead of just a transcript. Works with Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode on your own machine.

data.name: Ralph Workflow
data.description: Free open-source alternative to hosted AI coding platforms. Orchestrates Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode as an unattended CLI pipeline that ends in diff + checks + review notes instead of a transcript.
data.note: AlternativeTo typically requires logging in before submitting

directory_submissions.note: AlternativeTo typically requires logging in before submitting

data.name: Ralph Workflow
data.description: Free open-source CLI tool. Orchestrates AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode) for unattended project work with a reviewable finish state: diff, checks, and notes. No account, no cloud, runs on your own machine.
data.note: SaaSHub requires account creation before submission

directory_submissions.note: SaaSHub requires account creation before submission

data.name: Ralph Workflow
data.tagline: Open-source CLI that runs your AI coding agents unattended and leaves reviewable output
data.description: Ralph Workflow is a free, open-source orchestration CLI for Claude Code, Codex, and OpenCode. It runs unattended project-scale work and hands back a result you can actually review: a diff, test results, and a short note on what still needs judgment. For developers who want to leave bigger tasks running and come back to something mergeable.
data.note: Product Hunt requires maker account and is best for launch-day visibility

directory_submissions.note: Product Hunt requires maker account and is best for launch-day visibility
